# Guides by Gabriel Rufino
Technical guides on software architecture, databases, and application development.

## Site Contents
- [Architecture](https://guides.gabrielrufino.com/architecture):
  - [Distributed Locks](https://guides.gabrielrufino.com/architecture/distributed-locks): How to handle concurrency in distributed systems.
  - [Idempotency Keys](https://guides.gabrielrufino.com/architecture/idempotency-keys): Ensuring operations are performed only once.
  - [Multi-tenancy](https://guides.gabrielrufino.com/architecture/multi-tenancy): Strategies for serving multiple customers with a single deployment.
  - [Orchestration vs. Choreography](https://guides.gabrielrufino.com/architecture/orchestration-vs-choreography): Microservices communication patterns.
- [JavaScript](https://guides.gabrielrufino.com/javascript):
  - [Mutation tests in JavaScript](https://guides.gabrielrufino.com/javascript/mutation-tests-in-javascript): Ensuring test suite quality by mutating the source code.
- [MongoDB](https://guides.gabrielrufino.com/mongodb):
  - [Data Duplication in MongoDB](https://guides.gabrielrufino.com/mongodb/data-duplication-in-mongodb): Pros and cons of denormalization.
- [Observability](https://guides.gabrielrufino.com/observability):
  - [Logs in JSON](https://guides.gabrielrufino.com/observability/logs-in-json): Structuring logs for better machine readability.
- [SQL](https://guides.gabrielrufino.com/sql):
  - [Horizontal vs. Vertical Partitioning](https://guides.gabrielrufino.com/sql/horizontal-vs-vertical-partitioning): Scaling relational databases.
- [TypeScript](https://guides.gabrielrufino.com/typescript):
  - [Mixins in TypeScript](https://guides.gabrielrufino.com/typescript/mixins-in-typescript): Functional composition in TS.

## Metadata
- Source: https://github.com/gabrielrufino/guides
- Author: Gabriel Rufino (https://gabrielrufino.com)
- Built with: VitePress
